## What & why

<!-- Briefly describe the change and the motivation. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] **e2e**: an e2e spec was added or updated to cover this change (`tests/e2e`).
- [ ] **Migration**: if the Prisma schema changed, a migration is included (`prisma/migrations`).
- [ ] **Env**: if a new environment variable was introduced, `.env.example` documents it.
- [ ] **Admin card**: if a model was added, an admin `MODEL_CARDS` card was added for it.

<!--
Reminder: CI runs lint, typecheck, unit tests, e2e, and build on this PR. Local
hooks (`--no-verify` is emergencies-only) run a fast subset — CI is the source of truth.
-->
